common.privacyGuarantee: Your privacy is guaranteed. No public profiles. No leaderboards. No peer comparison. Ever.

languageSelector.heading: Choose Your Language
languageSelector.subheading: Select the language you'd like to use

welcome.message2: We connect you with meaningful project work — from home, on your schedule.
welcome.message3: Your identity stays private. Your earnings are yours.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little about yourself

skills.title: Your Skills
skills.instruction: Select the skills you have experience with. Be honest — tasks are matched to your actual skill level.

activation.title: You're Ready!
activation.message: Your account is set up. The APG will match you with suitable tasks shortly.
activation.step1: APG reviews your skills and matches tasks
activation.step2: You'll see available tasks in your dashboard
activation.step3: Complete tasks and build your Skill Genome

privacyBanner.title: Your Privacy is Protected
privacyBanner.body: No public profiles. No leaderboards. No peer comparison. Your data is private by design, not just policy.
